intended_use: Bunkerhill ECG-EF is software intended to aid in screening for Left Ventricular Ejection Fraction (LVEF) less than or equal to 40% in adults at risk for, but not already diagnosed with low LVEF.
intended_use_full: Bunkerhill ECG-EF is software intended to aid in screening for Left Ventricular Ejection Fraction (LVEF) less than or equal to 40% in adults at risk for, but not already diagnosed with low LVEF.
target_condition: Left Ventricular Ejection Fraction (LVEF) less than or equal to 40%
ground_truth: Transthoracic echocardiogram (TTE) using Simpson's Biplane measurement method taken less than 15 days apart from ECG scan
other_metrics: AUROC plot secondary acceptance criteria met; sensitivity and specificity confidence intervals reported (sensitivity 80.90–84.30, specificity 82.60–83.80)
